name: Picnic Potato Salad II
recipeIngredient: 1 medium onion or 6 green onions with tops, chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes and cook them in their jackets in a covered pot until they are tender.
2. Drain the potatoes, let them cool, then peel and slice or cube them.
3. Add the chopped onion, celery, pickles, and 4 pieces of hard-cooked eggs cut into small pieces to the potatoes. Mix lightly together.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the mayonnaise with French dressing, mustard, vinegar, cream, and salt until combined.
5. Pour the mixture over the potato salad and stir to coat evenly.
6. Slice the remaining 2 hard-cooked eggs and place on top of the salad.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Cover and chill.
